ast_check.command: python3 -c 'import ast; ast.parse(...)' for all src/*.py

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/ingestion-formats.md: corrected Factory project derivation from 'encoded dir name' to 'session_start.cwd' in both the Key Differences table and the body text. Added note that derive_project() is for Claude Code paths only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove or correct two statements: (1) 'Factory directories use same path encoding as Claude Code (-home-user-project = /home/user/project)' — Factory encoding does NOT preserve literal hyphens; (2) 'derive_project() currently only recognizes projects in path parts — needs extending for sessions' — derive_project() should NOT be used for Factory paths at all. Replace with: 'Factory project derivation uses session_start.cwd (not derive_project). derive_project() is for Claude Code encoded paths only.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-factory-project-derivation proved both AGENTS.md statements are incorrect. The git diff (commit 06f1da9) shows derive_project()'s 'sessions' check was removed and Factory now uses session_start.cwd. The worker had to deviate from AGENTS.md guidance to implement the correct fix.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update ingest-worker skill (.factory/droids/ingest-worker/) to remove guidance 'For Factory project derivation, extend derive_project() to also recognize sessions directories'. Replace with: 'Factory project derivation uses session_start.cwd extracted from the first record. Do NOT use derive_project() for Factory paths.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The ingest-worker skill's Key Constraints section contains incorrect guidance that led to the original bug. Worker session 05b379bc correctly deviated from this guidance. Worker skillFeedback.suggestedChanges confirmed: 'The ingest-worker skill says extend derive_project() but this feature required the opposite.'
